name: gitlab-dev
description: GitLab 开发工作流助手，用于 issue、MR、pipeline、review 与 worktree 交付。

interface.shortDescription: Ship GitLab work through branches, worktrees, and MRs
interface.longDescription: Guide GitLab issue, merge request, review, and pipeline tasks all the way through the actual GitLab delivery workflow.
defaultPrompt: 基于当前仓库处理一个 GitLab 任务，并最终交付到 MR。
